item.name: Modern Aesthetics - Master & Commander
item.description:
The realm's premier publication on beauty and fashion, this specific copy of Modern Aesthetics covers, in detail, techniques on imitating Ishgard's Lord Commander Aymeric─recently voted by Modern Aesthetics readers the realm's dreamiest temple knight.

Use to unlock a new hairstyle at the aesthetician.
Unavailable to Hrothgar.
